purpose: A planning-time token-budget estimator used by the master agent to size worker prompts before dispatch. Exports three functions: estimateTokens(text, type) which divides text length by a content-type ratio (prose=4, code=3, mixed=3.5) and ceils the result; formatBudget(sections, budgetLimit=8000) which produces a markdown table with per-section tokens, percentages, [!] flags for sections >40% of budget, and a WARNING line if total exceeds budget; checkBudget(sections, budgetLimit=8000) which returns a programmatic { total, overBudget, sections } object. CommonJS module — used by the master to keep worker prompts within the ~8000-token target documented in project_discovery.md.
gotchas: Token estimation is APPROXIMATE — uses character-per-token ratios (prose=4, code=3, mixed=3.5) not actual tokenization. Real token counts may differ significantly especially for unusual content.
Default budget is 8000 tokens — matches the worker prompt target documented in agent/core/project_discovery.md. If you change one, change the other to keep them aligned.
Mixed-content ratio (3.5) here MUST match the worker-side estimate in agent/worker/progress_reporting.md (Math.ceil(totalChars / 3.5)) — a divergence would produce inconsistent prompt_size reporting.
Unknown type values fall back to CHAR_RATIOS.mixed (no validation/error) — passing an unexpected type silently uses the mixed ratio.
[!] flag triggers at 40% of budget per section, NOT 50% — so any section >3200 tokens (default budget) is flagged even if total is under budget.
Module uses CommonJS exports (module.exports) — not ESM. Importing via `import` syntax requires interop shim.
patterns: Three-function public API: estimateTokens (single text), formatBudget (markdown table for human review), checkBudget (programmatic check).
Section-keyed sections object: { [name]: { text, type } } — same shape consumed by both formatBudget and checkBudget.
Per-section + total reporting with [!] flag at 40% of budget threshold.
Math.ceil rounding so token estimates never under-report.
conventions: Default budgetLimit = 8000 across both formatBudget and checkBudget.
Char-per-token ratios as named constants (CHAR_RATIOS) at module top.
JSDoc on every exported function with @param/@returns annotations.
